subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-16 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Should the loved ones of God arise as they must; should they come to exemplify these ideals: ' Keep all my words of prayer and praise confined to one refrain
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر احبای الهی چنانچه باید قیام کنند و بحالتی آیند که هر یک مصداق و اجعل اورادی ورداً
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @call to action
